system.notes:
Type: Hallucinogenic · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +1 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 18 · Cost: 900eb · Duration: 1D6+1 minutes.

Blue Glass was originally developed as a biological weapon. Under stress, you will have a 3 in 10 chance of “flashing out” — reduced to staring blankly at the pretty colors in your mind (reduce INT by 1 per dose). Roll 1D10 and hope.

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.123): a hallucinogen with no beneficial stat/roll boost (“Strength: +1” is the power rating, not a bonus); the “flashing out” / per-dose INT loss is recorded on the drug card as a psychosis note and adjudicated by the GM (not auto-applied). Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.psychosis: Under stress, 3-in-10 chance (roll 1D10) of flashing out: catatonic; reduce INT by 1 per dose.
